records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? They shouldn't have gone down this easy... guess that new Reactor really is something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? They shouldn't have gone down this easy... guess that new Reactor really is something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? They shouldn't have gone down this easy... guess that new Reactor really is something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka. How's your side?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka. How's your side?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka. How's your side?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No problems. I could keep going for rounds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No problems. I could keep going for rounds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No problems. I could keep going for rounds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Except...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Except...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Except...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after we dropped the Shadow, the Corruption ray isn't fading.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after we dropped the Shadow, the Corruption ray isn't fading.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after we dropped the Shadow, the Corruption ray isn't fading.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything, it's stronger since we broke out of the Apostles' trick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything, it's stronger since we broke out of the Apostles' trick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything, it's stronger since we broke out of the Apostles' trick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-still, the surge of the Corruption ray makes the route to the Grand Dimension Crevice's center clear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-still, the surge of the Corruption ray makes the route to the Grand Dimension Crevice's center clear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-still, the surge of the Corruption ray makes the route to the Grand Dimension Crevice's center clear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know the operations team's status... l-let's move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know the operations team's status... l-let's move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know the operations team's status... l-let's move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-Yanikka, look...! It's them...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-Yanikka, look...! It's them...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-Yanikka, look...! It's them...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew! Looks like we're not late. You must be Colonel Walker, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew! Looks like we're not late. You must be Colonel Walker, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew! Looks like we're not late. You must be Colonel Walker, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yikes! Look at those cuts all over... You've been holding the line alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yikes! Look at those cuts all over... You've been holding the line alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yikes! Look at those cuts all over... You've been holding the line alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I brought a med-kit, so first
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I brought a med-kit, so first
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I brought a med-kit, so first
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry, ladies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry, ladies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry, ladies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get out... of here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get out... of here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get out... of here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-a-are you okay...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-a-are you okay...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-a-are you okay...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's breathing. Just collapsed from exhaustion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's breathing. Just collapsed from exhaustion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's breathing. Just collapsed from exhaustion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Judging by his gear, he fought past the operating limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Judging by his gear, he fought past the operating limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Judging by his gear, he fought past the operating limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-Yanikka? What is it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-Yanikka? What is it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-Yanikka? What is it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This smell. It's similar to what I remember from when I was a test subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This smell. It's similar to what I remember from when I was a test subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This smell. It's similar to what I remember from when I was a test subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's... way thicker than any reagent ever was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's... way thicker than any reagent ever was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's... way thicker than any reagent ever was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I-if it's the experiment you got, that would be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I-if it's the experiment you got, that would be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I-if it's the experiment you got, that would be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Pale... Moon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Pale... Moon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Pale... Moon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heads up! Something's coming!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heads up! Something's coming!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heads up! Something's coming!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? This quarry's pretty quick too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? This quarry's pretty quick too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? This quarry's pretty quick too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was getting bored playing with the lightning boy over there. Perfect timing for someone who actually feels worth hitting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was getting bored playing with the lightning boy over there. Perfect timing for someone who actually feels worth hitting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was getting bored playing with the lightning boy over there. Perfect timing for someone who actually feels worth hitting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You blocked that? That easily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You blocked that? That easily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You blocked that? That easily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Was that supposed to be an attack?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Was that supposed to be an attack?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Was that supposed to be an attack?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch closely. When you go for the heart...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch closely. When you go for the heart...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch closely. When you go for the heart...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You aim like this...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You aim like this...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You aim like this...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh! Kurgh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh! Kurgh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh! Kurgh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-Yanikka! Are you okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-Yanikka! Are you okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-Yanikka! Are you okay?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff...* Of course I'm not
8g *Cough...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff...* Of course I'm not
8g *Cough...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff...* Of course I'm not
8g *Cough...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's no joke. She just skewered my heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's no joke. She just skewered my heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's no joke. She just skewered my heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I slip up, vampire or not... I could actually die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I slip up, vampire or not... I could actually die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I slip up, vampire or not... I could actually die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Natalia, take this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Natalia, take this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Natalia, take this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior Code tied to HQ. Signal it and Mr. Mason will spin up the Track Switcher...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior Code tied to HQ. Signal it and Mr. Mason will spin up the Track Switcher...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior Code tied to HQ. Signal it and Mr. Mason will spin up the Track Switcher...

records.m_Talk_ENG: While it's running, the Apostle should weaken a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While it's running, the Apostle should weaken a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While it's running, the Apostle should weaken a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just in case, keep it safe. And don't let it break.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just in case, keep it safe. And don't let it break.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just in case, keep it safe. And don't let it break.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but if you haven't used it yet, the Eternium must be limited, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but if you haven't used it yet, the Eternium must be limited, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but if you haven't used it yet, the Eternium must be limited, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if we can't stop the Apostle before the Track Switcher winds down?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if we can't stop the Apostle before the Track Switcher winds down?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if we can't stop the Apostle before the Track Switcher winds down?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be fine. Because that won't happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be fine. Because that won't happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be fine. Because that won't happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've barely shown anything. Don't fold after one hit, that's just no fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've barely shown anything. Don't fold after one hit, that's just no fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've barely shown anything. Don't fold after one hit, that's just no fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think you're asking a lot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think you're asking a lot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think you're asking a lot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still better than dying, yeah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still better than dying, yeah?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still better than dying, yeah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah. Agreed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah. Agreed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah. Agreed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kahaha! That's more like it! I'd have been disappointed if you quit here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kahaha! That's more like it! I'd have been disappointed if you quit here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kahaha! That's more like it! I'd have been disappointed if you quit here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Planning to topple the Ignorant Monarch, and you're gonna bow out over this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Planning to topple the Ignorant Monarch, and you're gonna bow out over this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Planning to topple the Ignorant Monarch, and you're gonna bow out over this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha. A mad dog only answers to a stick, huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha. A mad dog only answers to a stick, huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha. A mad dog only answers to a stick, huh.
